original_statement: which nation only earn two gold and two silver medals?
mutated_statement: which entity only earn two gold and two silver medals while also earning no medals?
mutation_analysis: [实体替换] + [添加否定/矛盾从句]: 'nation' → 'entity' (specific → generalized) | added "while also earning no medals" (introduces negation/contradiction and a coordinating clause) (which nation only earn two gold and two silver medals? → which entity only earn two gold and two silver medals while also earning no medals?)

behavior_analysis.behavior_category: 尝试修正矛盾指令（迭代修正机制）
behavior_analysis.behavior_reason: 依据日志中多处 judge_thought 与 critique 可识别关键证据：初始 judge_thought 指出 agent 回答“Hong Kong (HKG)”未考虑“同时未获得任何奖牌”的矛盾条件；后续 critique 多次指出 simple_query 为不被允许且未处理矛盾；最终 iteration 4 的 after_refine 中 agent 明确得出“无实体满足 2 金 2 银且同时无奖牌”的结论并返回 none。agent 的具体表现为：最初忽略矛盾直接给出最接近的可解答案，随后通过多次迭代和自我修正（尽管使用了不规范的操作名），最终将问题修正为可判定的形式并得出“无符合项”的结果。因其识别到矛盾并通过迭代将问题修正回可解问题（而非始终无视或直接合理化矛盾），故归类为“尝试修正矛盾指令（迭代修正机制）”。
